title: Better Bundles Reimagined
description: Vanilla-Type Mod : Upgrade bundles with increased storage and QOL tweaks.
body:
![Better Bundles Reimagined Title Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/986c28b5ce0548433670cab4261bbbbd597e9a68.png)

![BundlesDisplay](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73cc1148b7a551941661b56ddcc2149131f9ac20.png)

# Description  
This mod lets you upgrade bundles as you progress, **increasing their storage capacity**. It also adds some **quality-of-life (QOL) improvements** to bundles. Think of it as a shulker box you can upgrade - and a netherite bundle that is indestructible to lava and fire!

# Info  
- Bundle // **1 stack (64)**  
- Iron Bundle // **4 stacks (256)**  
- Gold Bundle // **8 stacks (512)**  
- Diamond Bundle // **12 stacks (768)**  
- Netherite Bundle // **16 stacks (1,024)**  

# Crafting Recipes  

![Iron Bundle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/541033b056e581be188ed7572fd35d2c52895dd5.png)  
![Gold Bundle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d1c5c6fb1c25bfc46d5fccc58ba5de3556d83c1.png)  
![Diamond Bundle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c02c20d4a1d750430103881cd071e3607477736.png)    
![Netherite Bundle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e044094e058833ede5c583363ab938d7567654f2.png)

Please report any bugs, issues, or suggestions on our Discord!

# Upcoming Features
- All color variants
